site.name: JoinMyPDF
site.defaultTitle: JoinMyPDF — Private PDF tools in your browser
site.defaultDescription: Merge, split, compress, and convert PDFs locally in your browser. No watermark on standard output, no forced signup for typical use.

categories.label: Convert
categories.description: Switch between image and PDF formats with browser-side processing.

categories.label: Optimize
categories.description: Reduce PDF delivery size while preserving practical readability.

categories.label: Edit
categories.description: Merge and split document flows for team-ready output.

categories.label: Security
categories.description: Password protection and privacy controls processed locally in your browser.

tools.title: Merge PDF Online
tools.intent: Merge multiple PDF files quickly in one browser session.
tools.description: Merge PDF files online with drag-and-drop ordering and instant in-browser output.
useCases: Combine monthly reports into one management packet
Merge legal forms and attachments before submission
Create onboarding document bundles for HR teams

faq.q: Can I merge more than two PDF files at once?
faq.a: Yes. Add multiple PDFs and drag them into the exact order you need.

faq.q: Is PDF merge processing private?
faq.a: Yes. Files are processed client-side in your browser.

faq.q: Will page quality change after merging?
faq.a: The merge workflow copies pages into one file without intentional quality loss.

faq.q: Can I merge PDFs on mobile?
faq.a: Yes. The upload and reorder UI is responsive for mobile browsers.

longTailPages.angle: Speed-first merging for quick delivery workflows
Touch-friendly PDF merge workflow for phones

tools.title: Compress PDF Online
tools.intent: Reduce PDF file size for sharing and faster downloads.
tools.description: Compress PDF files online using browser-based optimization controls and instant download.
useCases: Shrink proposal decks for email attachments
Optimize policy documents for faster mobile downloads
Reduce support manuals for customer sharing

faq.q: Does PDF compression affect readability?
faq.a: Compression can reduce detail at lower settings, so choose a balanced level.

faq.q: Can I adjust compression intensity?
faq.a: Yes. Use the range slider before generating the optimized output.

faq.q: Is this PDF compressor browser-only?
faq.a: Yes. The flow runs locally in the browser with no backend processing.

faq.q: Can I use this for business documents?
faq.a: Yes. Teams commonly compress reports, contracts, and presentations.

longTailPages.angle: Maximum size reduction for lightweight sharing

tools.title: Split PDF Online
tools.intent: Split one PDF into page-level files for reuse and archiving.
tools.description: Split PDF documents into single-page files with local processing.
useCases: Extract one signed page from a full contract
Separate textbook chapters for learning packs
Archive project appendices as standalone files

faq.q: Can I export all pages separately?
faq.a: Yes. Each page is exported as an individual PDF file.

faq.q: Will page order remain correct?
faq.a: Yes. Output follows the original PDF order.

faq.q: Is this split tool free?
faq.a: Yes. You can split PDFs directly in your browser.

faq.q: Do I need to install software?
faq.a: No. This is a browser-based tool.

tools.title: JPG to PDF Converter
tools.intent: Convert JPG and PNG images into one ordered PDF.
tools.description: Convert JPG and PNG images into one PDF with drag-and-drop ordering.
useCases: Convert expense receipts to one PDF report
Create PDF portfolios from design snapshots
Bundle classroom worksheets from photos

faq.q: Can I convert multiple JPG files together?
faq.a: Yes. Upload and reorder files to control final page sequence.

faq.q: Are PNG files supported?
faq.a: Yes. JPG and PNG files are both supported.

faq.q: Is image conversion secure?
faq.a: Yes. Files stay local in your browser session.

faq.q: Can I use this on iPhone or Android?
faq.a: Yes. Mobile browsers are supported.

tools.title: PDF to JPG Converter
tools.intent: Export PDF pages as JPG images for publishing and sharing.
tools.description: Convert PDF pages into JPG images for publishing and sharing.
useCases: Create website visuals from PDF documents
Extract presentation slides as images
Generate social-ready graphics from PDF pages

faq.q: Does each PDF page become a JPG file?
faq.a: Yes. Each page is exported as a separate JPG.

faq.q: Is output quality web-friendly?
faq.a: Yes. Export settings balance quality and file size.

faq.q: Can I convert large PDFs?
faq.a: Yes, though processing time depends on page count and device.

faq.q: Do files leave my device?
faq.a: No. Conversion is local in your browser.

tools.title: Protect PDF with Password
tools.intent: Add a password to your PDF in the browser—files stay on your device.
tools.description: Password-protect a PDF locally in your browser. AES-256 encryption with instant download—no upload to our servers.
useCases: Share confidential contracts with a password gate
Lock HR or payroll packets before email
Protect client deliverables for freelance handoffs

faq.q: Is my password sent to JoinMyPDF servers?
faq.a: No. Encryption runs entirely in your browser session. Your file and password never leave your device.

faq.q: What encryption standard is used?
faq.a: Protected PDFs use AES-256 encryption compatible with common PDF readers.

faq.q: Can I protect a PDF that already has a password?
faq.a: You need to unlock or re-export the file first if it is already encrypted.

faq.q: Will the protected PDF open in Adobe Acrobat and Preview?
faq.a: Yes. Standard PDF viewers prompt for the password you set here.

tools.title: Unlock PDF — Remove Password
tools.intent: Remove a PDF password in your browser—files stay on your device.
tools.description: Unlock a password-protected PDF locally in your browser. Decryption runs on your device with instant download—no upload to our servers.
useCases: Open client PDFs you are allowed to edit after entering the shared password
Remove protection before merging or compressing in JoinMyPDF
Save an unprotected copy for archival when policy allows

faq.q: Is my password sent to JoinMyPDF servers?
faq.a: No. Decryption runs entirely in your browser. Your file and password never leave your device.

faq.q: What if I enter the wrong password?
faq.a: You will see a clear message to try again. The file is not uploaded anywhere.

faq.q: Can I unlock PDFs I am not authorized to open?
faq.a: Only use this tool on files you own or are permitted to access. We do not bypass legal restrictions.

faq.q: Will the unlocked PDF work in Acrobat and Preview?
faq.a: Yes. The output is a standard unprotected PDF compatible with common viewers.

tools.title: Redact PDF — Black Out Sensitive Text
tools.primaryKeyword: redact pdf online black out text
tools.intent: Mark and permanently black out private content in your browser.
tools.description: Redact sensitive information from a PDF locally in your browser. Draw black boxes over private content—your document never leaves your device.
useCases: Hide customer names or account numbers before sharing a statement
Black out signatures or ID numbers in HR packets
Sanitize legal exhibits before sending to external counsel

faq.q: Is my PDF uploaded to JoinMyPDF servers?
faq.a: No. Redaction runs entirely in your browser. Your file never leaves your device.

faq.q: Can redacted text still be copied?
faq.a: Pages you mark are flattened to images with black boxes burned in, so underlying text on those pages cannot be selected or copied.

faq.q: Can I redact password-protected PDFs?
faq.a: Yes. Enter the document password to preview pages, mark areas, then export the redacted file.

faq.q: Will redaction work in Adobe Acrobat and Preview?
faq.a: Yes. The output is a standard PDF with visible black redaction boxes.

tools.title: Delete PDF Pages
tools.intent: Remove unwanted pages from a PDF in your browser—files stay on your device.
tools.description: Delete PDF pages locally in your browser. Pick thumbnails to remove and download a cleaned file—no upload to our servers.
useCases: Drop blank or duplicate pages before sending a report
Remove appendix pages from a client packet
Trim scanned PDFs to only the pages you need

faq.q: Is my PDF uploaded to JoinMyPDF servers?
faq.a: No. Page removal runs entirely in your browser. Your file never leaves your device.

faq.q: Can I delete multiple pages at once?
faq.a: Yes. Mark any combination of pages, then click Delete Pages once.

faq.q: Can I delete every page?
faq.a: No. At least one page must remain in the output PDF.

faq.q: Will fonts and layout stay intact on remaining pages?
faq.a: Yes. Remaining pages are preserved from the original file without re-compressing content.

tools.title: PNG to PDF Converter
tools.intent: Convert PNG images into one ordered PDF in your browser.
tools.description: Convert PNG files to PDF locally with drag-and-drop ordering and instant download—no upload to our servers.
useCases: Bundle UI screenshots into one shareable PDF
Turn transparent PNG graphics into a print-ready document
Combine scanned PNG pages from mobile scans

faq.q: Is my PNG uploaded to JoinMyPDF servers?
faq.a: No. Conversion runs entirely in your browser. Your images never leave your device.

faq.q: Can I convert multiple PNG files at once?
faq.a: Yes. Upload several PNGs and reorder them before converting.

faq.q: Are transparent PNG backgrounds preserved?
faq.a: Yes. PNG transparency is embedded in the PDF pages as in the original images.

faq.q: Can I use this on mobile?
faq.a: Yes. Modern mobile browsers support the full workflow.

tools.title: HEIC to PDF Converter
tools.intent: Convert iPhone HEIC photos into a downloadable PDF entirely in your browser.
tools.description: Upload .heic or .heif images and download a multi-page PDF locally—no upload to our servers.
useCases: Turn iPhone HEIC camera rolls into one shareable PDF
Submit photo evidence or receipts that were saved as HEIC
Archive HEIC albums without desktop software

faq.q: Is my HEIC photo uploaded to JoinMyPDF?
faq.a: No. Decoding and PDF creation run entirely in your browser on your device.

faq.q: Can I convert multiple HEIC files at once?
faq.a: Yes. Add several files, reorder them, and export one PDF with one page per image.

faq.q: Which formats are supported?
faq.a: Apple HEIC and HEIF images (.heic, .heif). JPG and PNG files should use our JPG or PNG to PDF tools.

faq.q: Will the PDF keep full photo resolution?
faq.a: Yes. Each page uses the converted image dimensions rather than forcing a fixed A4 crop.

tools.title: PDF to PNG Converter
tools.intent: Export PDF pages as high-quality PNG images in your browser.
tools.description: Convert PDF pages to PNG locally at 2× scale. Download individual pages or a ZIP archive—no upload to our servers.
useCases: Extract slides as lossless PNG for design tools
Save PDF pages with crisp text for presentations
Get transparent-friendly PNG exports for web assets

faq.q: Does each PDF page become a PNG file?
faq.a: Yes. Each page is exported as a separate PNG at 2× scale for sharp output.

faq.q: Can I download all pages at once?
faq.a: Yes. Use Download all as ZIP after export completes.

faq.q: Is my PDF uploaded to JoinMyPDF?
faq.a: No. Rendering runs entirely in your browser on your device.

faq.q: Why PNG instead of JPG?
faq.a: PNG is lossless and better when you need maximum quality or transparency in downstream edits.

tools.title: PDF to Word Converter
tools.intent: Convert PDF text into an editable Word document (.docx) entirely in your browser.
tools.description: Extract text from PDF pages and download a structured .docx file locally—no upload to our servers.
useCases: Reuse contract or report text in Microsoft Word
Edit exported PDF content without retyping
Turn lecture notes PDFs into editable documents

faq.q: Is my PDF uploaded to JoinMyPDF?
faq.a: No. Parsing and .docx generation run entirely in your browser on your device.

faq.q: Will formatting match the original PDF exactly?
faq.a: The tool preserves paragraphs and page breaks from extractable text. Complex layouts, tables, and images are not recreated pixel-perfect.

faq.q: Does it work on scanned PDFs?
faq.a: Scanned image-only PDFs have no selectable text to extract. Use a PDF with real text or run OCR elsewhere first.

faq.q: What file do I download?
faq.a: A standard .docx file you can open in Microsoft Word, Google Docs, or LibreOffice.

tools.title: Word to PDF Converter
tools.intent: Convert Word documents (.docx) into PDF files entirely in your browser.
tools.description: Upload a .docx file and download a print-ready PDF locally—no upload to our servers.
useCases: Share editable Word drafts as fixed PDFs
Submit assignments or forms that require PDF format
Archive client proposals without opening desktop apps

faq.q: Is my Word file uploaded to JoinMyPDF?
faq.a: No. Parsing and PDF generation run entirely in your browser on your device.

faq.q: Which format is supported?
faq.a: Modern .docx files (Microsoft Word 2007 and later). Legacy .doc files are not supported.

faq.q: Will the PDF look exactly like Word?
faq.a: The tool converts document content through HTML layout. Complex formatting, custom fonts, and some images may differ slightly.

faq.q: Can I convert password-protected documents?
faq.a: Encrypted or corrupted files may fail to parse. Remove protection in Word and try again.

tools.title: Excel to PDF Converter
tools.intent: Convert Excel spreadsheets (.xlsx) into landscape PDF files entirely in your browser.
tools.description: Upload a workbook and download a print-ready landscape PDF locally—no upload to our servers.
useCases: Share budget or forecast sheets as fixed PDFs
Submit spreadsheet reports that require PDF format
Archive multi-sheet workbooks without desktop Excel

faq.q: Is my Excel file uploaded to JoinMyPDF?
faq.a: No. Parsing and PDF generation run entirely in your browser on your device.

faq.q: Which format is supported?
faq.a: Modern .xlsx workbooks (Excel 2007 and later). Legacy .xls files are not supported.

faq.q: How are multiple sheets handled?
faq.a: Each non-empty sheet is included in the PDF with a sheet title. Output uses landscape A4 orientation for wider tables.

faq.q: Will formulas and charts appear in the PDF?
faq.a: The PDF shows cell values as HTML tables. Charts and complex formatting may not transfer exactly.

tools.title: PowerPoint to PDF Converter
tools.intent: Convert PowerPoint presentations (.pptx) into landscape PDF files entirely in your browser.
tools.description: Upload a presentation and download a print-ready landscape PDF locally—no upload to our servers.
useCases: Share slide decks as fixed PDF handouts
Submit presentations that require PDF format
Archive slides without desktop PowerPoint

faq.q: Is my PowerPoint file uploaded to JoinMyPDF?
faq.a: No. Parsing and PDF generation run entirely in your browser on your device.

faq.q: Which format is supported?
faq.a: Modern .pptx presentations (PowerPoint 2007 and later). Legacy .ppt files are not supported.

faq.q: How are slides handled?
faq.a: Each slide becomes one landscape A4 PDF page with extracted text content.

faq.q: Will images and animations appear in the PDF?
faq.a: The PDF shows text extracted from slide XML. Images, charts, and animations may not transfer exactly.

tools.title: PDF to PowerPoint Converter
tools.intent: Convert PDF pages into an editable PowerPoint (.pptx) presentation entirely in your browser.
tools.description: Extract text from each PDF page and download a native .pptx file locally—no upload to our servers.
useCases: Reuse PDF report text in a slide deck
Turn scanned PDF pages into editable slides
Draft presentations from existing PDF documents

faq.q: Is my PDF uploaded to JoinMyPDF?
faq.a: No. Text extraction and .pptx generation run entirely in your browser on your device.

faq.q: How is the PowerPoint structured?
faq.a: Each PDF page becomes one 16:9 slide with extracted text paragraphs.

faq.q: Will images and layout be preserved?
faq.a: This tool extracts text only. Images, tables, and exact formatting may not transfer.

faq.q: Can I edit the downloaded file?
faq.a: Yes. The output is a standard .pptx file you can open and edit in PowerPoint or Google Slides.

tools.title: PDF to Excel Converter
tools.intent: Convert PDF text into an editable Excel (.xlsx) spreadsheet entirely in your browser.
tools.description: Parse PDF text by position into rows and columns, then download a native .xlsx workbook locally—no upload to our servers.
useCases: Extract tabular data from PDF reports
Turn invoice or statement PDFs into editable sheets
Reuse PDF lists and tables in Excel

faq.q: Is my PDF uploaded to JoinMyPDF?
faq.a: No. Parsing and spreadsheet generation run entirely in your browser on your device.

faq.q: How are rows and columns detected?
faq.a: Text fragments are grouped by Y position into rows and by X position into columns on each PDF page.

faq.q: Does each PDF page become a sheet?
faq.a: Yes. Each page with extractable text becomes its own worksheet in the workbook.

faq.q: Will complex tables transfer perfectly?
faq.a: Simple tabular PDFs work best. Merged cells, images, and scanned pages may need manual cleanup.

tools.title: Add Page Numbers to PDF
tools.primaryKeyword: add page numbers to pdf online
tools.intent: Stamp page numbers on a PDF with flexible position and format in your browser.
tools.description: Add page numbers to PDF files locally—choose corner placement, start page, and simple or Page X of Y format.
useCases: Number report drafts before client review
Add footer numbers to scanned document packs
Start numbering after a cover page

faq.q: Can I skip the cover page when numbering?
faq.a: Yes. Set Start from page to 2 (or later) to begin numbering after your title page.

faq.q: Which positions are supported?
faq.a: Top or bottom, aligned left, center, or right on each page.

faq.q: Is my PDF uploaded to your servers?
faq.a: No. Numbering runs entirely in your browser on your device.

faq.q: What format options are available?
faq.a: Use a plain number (1) or Page X of Y for the numbered section.

tools.title: Sign PDF Online
tools.intent: Draw or type a signature and place it on your PDF in the browser.
tools.description: Sign PDF documents locally—draw or type your signature, drag it into place, and download a signed file. Nothing is uploaded to our servers.
useCases: Sign a freelance contract before sending it back
Add a handwritten signature to a scanned form
Initial each page of a short agreement

faq.q: Is my PDF or signature uploaded to JoinMyPDF?
faq.a: No. Signing runs entirely in your browser. Your document and signature never leave your device.

faq.q: Can I draw and type signatures?
faq.a: Yes. Use Draw for a mouse or touch signature, or Type for a handwriting-style typed name.

faq.q: Can I place the signature on any page?
faq.a: Yes. Choose the page, then drag and resize the signature overlay before downloading.

faq.q: Is this a legally binding e-signature?
faq.a: JoinMyPDF provides a visual signature stamp. For regulated agreements, confirm requirements with your jurisdiction or counsel.
